nodes.name: retail_node (pi5)

agents.name: retail_portal.py
agents.desc: Customer dashboard + API (gunicorn, port 5001). Phase C D2 refactor extracted 12 helpers from 4 hotspot endpoints (stripe_webhook, _enrich_positions, get_system_status, api_admin_market_activity) dropping line counts 46-87%. 2026-04-23 portal-v2 refactor: all 15 inline HTML constants extracted to src/templates/*.html (base.html + 14 page templates); retail_portal.py shrunk 14,294 → 5,931 lines (58%). New /terms/view public route for prospective users to read ToS before signup. ToS acceptance captured on the signup form itself (required checkbox + audit trail in pending_signups: tos_accepted_at, tos_version, tos_ip, tos_user_agent). Session inactivity timeout configurable via CUSTOMER_SESSION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES env var (0 disables).

agents.name: retail_watchdog.py
agents.desc: Crash monitor, auto-restart x3

agents.name: retail_market_daemon.py
agents.desc: Enrichment pipeline 9:15-16:00 ET. Pre-market prep at 09:15 (full once-daily pipeline: tradable_refresh, screener, news, sentiment, macro, state, bias, fault, validator, promoter, candidate_gen, earnings_refresh) + selfcheck. Intraday every 30m (skips once-daily agents). Close session at 16:00 runs trader close + exit_backfill + trail_optimizer + sector_screener_pass2 + daily_master. 2026-04-21 fixes: timer 09:10→09:15 (dispatcher alignment), full overnight_cycle, mid-day restart fires enrichment immediately, run_premarket_selfcheck advisory gate. No longer runs trader or price_poller inline — both are standalone systemd units.

agents.name: retail_trade_daemon.py
agents.desc: Continuous trader 9:30-16:00 ET, 30s cycle, MAX_TRADE_PARALLEL=3 subprocess pool. Same 13-gate logic, now runs at market speed instead of 30-min cadence. Phase 1 of TRADER_RESTRUCTURE_PLAN. Phase C D1 refactor: run() 897→15 lines via 11 named helpers (_run_halt_check, _start_watchdog, _init_clients, _run_gate0_account_health, _run_market_gates, _run_position_management, _run_managed_mode_approvals, _run_signal_evaluation, _run_monthly_tax_sweep, _send_session_summary, _send_daily_report).
agents.how: systemd (synthos-trade-daemon.timer, Mon..Fri 09:25 ET — re-enabled 2026-04-20T21:20 EDT after Phase C verification)

agents.name: retail_scheduler.py
agents.desc: Off-hours session orchestrator. Dispatches per-customer subprocesses for enrichment when market_daemon isn't covering the slot.
agents.how: cron — overnight :05 hourly weekdays (off-hours only), weekend :05 hourly Sat+Sun, Sunday 20:00 prep session. Uses SessionLock (fcntl flock) to prevent overlap. is_market_hours() now delegates to retail_shared (D6/R10-7).

agents.name: retail_interrogation_listener.py
agents.desc: UDP cross-validation, port 5556

agents.name: retail_trade_logic_agent.py
agents.desc: 13-gate trade execution + screener integration
agents.how: subprocess (spawned by synthos-trade-daemon.timer, Mon-Fri 09:25 ET + every 30s during market hours)

agents.name: retail_news_agent.py
agents.desc: 22-gate news classification + 2026-04-21 attribution patch — Alpaca ingestion now prefilters crypto/untradable (Fix A, enforced), re-ranks multi-symbol articles by headline match (Fix C, shadow), populates signals.company from tradable_assets.name. Flags remap/conflict/no_match to signal_attribution_flags for review.

agents.name: retail_market_sentiment_agent.py
agents.desc: 27-gate deterioration detection

agents.name: retail_sector_screener.py
agents.desc: Sector momentum scoring — 11 S&P SPDR sector ETFs × top-10 holdings each, per-ticker calc_momentum_score (3m return 50% + 20d/50d SMA 30% + 10d/30d volume 20%). Runs 2x/day (pre-market 09:15 + close 16:00) — momentum is a multi-week signal so twice daily captures yesterday's close + today's close, plenty for the slow-moving inputs. Output populates sector_screening table including momentum_score column (2026-04-21+). 30-hour fault-detection stale threshold tolerates a missed day.

agents.name: retail_candidate_generator.py
agents.desc: Phase 3b — emits sector-driven candidate signals (source='candidate', status='WATCHING'). Reads sector_screening rows where momentum_score >= MIN_MOMENTUM_SCORE (0.45 as of 2026-04-21). Top-N per sector (3), global cap 30. Trader consumes directly from the VALIDATED signal pool (no longer via trade_windows — see 2026-04-24 window_calculator removal).

agents.name: retail_event_calendar.py
agents.desc: Phase 5.a — Gate 4 EVENT_RISK calendar. Nasdaq bulk earnings fetch + macro_events table. Called from market_daemon's enrichment tick.

agents.name: retail_tradable_cache.py
agents.desc: Audit Round 5 — Alpaca /v2/assets cache (~11k us_equity symbols). Candidate Generator uses is_tradable() to filter out crypto/delisted/OTC before emission. Refreshed once per trading day in premarket.

agents.name: retail_daily_master.py
agents.desc: Phase 5.c — end-of-day audit rollup. Renders logs/daily_master/YYYY-MM-DD.md with opens/closes/candidates/cooling-off/earnings tables. Fires at market close from run_close_session.

agents.name: retail_macro_regime_agent.py
agents.desc: Macro regime classifier (BEAR/BULL/NORMAL trend × volatility). Runs in enrichment pipeline.

agents.name: retail_market_state_agent.py
agents.desc: Market state detector (open/close/holiday) for session gating. Writes _MARKET_STATE, _MARKET_STATE_SCORE, and _MARKET_STATE_UPDATED (the last one added 2026-04-21 — the validator's staleness check read the key but market_state_agent never wrote it, so every validator run flagged DEGRADED_STALE_MARKET_STATE).

agents.name: retail_bias_detection_agent.py
agents.desc: Behavioral-bias detector (sector concentration, loss aversion, disposition effect).

agents.name: retail_fault_detection_agent.py
agents.desc: Data freshness + system resources + account health checks.

agents.name: retail_validator_stack_agent.py
agents.desc: Final enrichment stamp — promotes QUEUED → VALIDATED when all prior stamps present.

agents.name: retail_shared.py
agents.desc: Phase C D6 — canonical kill_switch_active() / get_active_customers() / is_market_hours() shared by market_daemon, scheduler, portal, trader, dry_run. Replaces 5 near-duplicate local copies. now_et() and fetch_with_retry() intentionally left local (diverged return types / stateful circuit-breaker globals).

agents.name: retail_sector_backfill_agent.py
agents.desc: One-off/periodic backfill for missing sector_screening rows.

agents.name: retail_price_poller.py
agents.desc: Live-price refresher for the live_prices table — feeds portal + trader's in-band window check. 2026-04-21: moved from inline market_daemon loop call to standalone systemd timer firing every 60s, 24/7. Decoupling ensures prices stay fresh even when market_daemon isn't running (pre-pre-market, post-close, weekends).

agents.name: rotate_logs.py
agents.desc: Weekly log rotation + 30-day archive cleanup

agents.name: retail_heartbeat.py
agents.desc: POST agent status to pi4b monitor (called directly by long-running services, plus hourly cron as a standalone ping)
agents.how: cron 21 * * * 1-5 (hourly :21 weekdays) + inline calls from daemons

agents.name: node_heartbeat.py
agents.desc: System metrics to monitor

agents.name: retail_boot_sequence.py
agents.desc: Network wait, integrity check — trade-daemon / market-daemon services After= this one so they wait for a healthy boot before firing

agents.name: retail_health_check.py
agents.desc: Post-reboot DB + Alpaca verify

agents.name: retail_patch.py
agents.desc: Safe file updater, rollback

agents.name: retail_backup.py
agents.desc: Nightly archive to pi4b staging

agents.name: retail_shutdown.py
agents.desc: Graceful pre-maintenance shutdown

agents.name: rebuild_default_template.py
agents.desc: Nightly customer DB template rebuild

agents.name: customer_health_check.py
agents.desc: Called by auditor for customer DB health

nodes.note: DISABLED 2026-04-20 — node unreachable via SSH (58 NODE_UNREACHABLE hits/day). Auditor now skips this node via 'disabled': True in REMOTE_NODES config (company_auditor.py). Re-enable by removing the flag when hardware returns.

nodes.note: DISABLED 2026-04-20 — display powered off pending power-source relocation (was USB-powered from operator's main PC, needs standalone supply). No ETA for return. Removed from auditor NODES dict + system_architecture.json status 'disabled'. Restore when hardware comes back.

data_flow.trading_pipeline: Market Daemon (9:15-16:00) orchestrates enrichment → candidate_generator emits sector-driven candidates by momentum_score → validator_stack promotes to VALIDATED → trade_daemon (continuous 9:30-16:00, 30s cycles) pulls VALIDATED signals directly + live_prices → 13-gate eval per signal (Gate 6 chase caps block peak entries) → BUY / SKIP / WATCH / EXIT → Alpaca API
data_flow.shared_data: price_poller (standalone 24/7 timer, every 60s) → live_prices. News/Sentiment → shared signals pool → all customers see same intel. Sector screener → momentum_score on sector_screening table → candidate_generator filter.
data_flow.monitoring: Auditor → SSH scans pi4b + pi5 → company.db suggestions. Sentinel ← heartbeats → silence alerts → Scoop. Librarian → SSH package audit → CVE alerts. pi2w nodes currently disabled (power-source relocation pending).
data_flow.backup_chain: pi5 retail_backup.py (1:30am) → tar.gz → POST to pi4b /receive_backup → Strongbox (2am) → AES-256 encrypt → Cloudflare R2 (30-day retention)

premarket_prep_09_15.notes: Full-pipeline once-daily — INCLUDES tradable_refresh, screener, earnings_refresh. After completion, daemon enters continuous intraday loop until close.
steps: promote_validated_signals (QUEUED → VALIDATED where all stamps present)
run_price_poller (initial priming; standalone timer also fires every 60s)
run_premarket_selfcheck (advisory — validates pipeline artifacts; logs + flags + continues)

intraday_enrichment_30min.notes: Skips once-daily agents (tradable_refresh, screener, earnings_refresh). First cycle fires immediately on daemon startup (mid-day restart scenario).

close_session_16_00.fires: once at 16:00 ET, inside run_market_loop exit
close_session_16_00.notes: Post-market wrap-up. 2026-04-21: added 2nd daily sector screener pass so tomorrow's pre-market starts from fresher close-based data.

overnight_cycle_offhours.fires: weekend / post-close weekday when market_daemon is invoked outside trading hours (cron-scheduled hourly for safety; main() picks this path based on clock)
overnight_cycle_offhours.notes: One-shot — does not loop. Mirrors full pipeline so weekend runs keep signals warm for Monday's pre-market.

daily_timeline_weekday_et.event: retail_backup.py — create archive, POST to pi4b /receive_backup
company_strongbox.py — encrypt staged backups, upload to R2
rebuild_default_template.py — nightly fresh default customer DB schema
synthos-trade-daemon.timer fires; daemon starts and waits for 09:30 open
trade_daemon continuous 30s cycles + market_daemon enrichment every 30 min (14 cycles)
market close — trade_daemon exits cleanly, market_daemon runs close_session (trader-close + exit_backfill + trail_optimizer + sector_screener pass #2 + daily_master)
synthos-price-poller.timer → refresh live_prices for portal + trader
company_librarian.py — weekly package audit, CVE scan

resolved: Signup auto-approve silently broken by SQLite write-lock deadlock in verify_signup_email — fixed 2026-04-23 (dedented approve_signup call outside the outer _auth_conn() write transaction; previously pending_signups stayed PENDING forever with email_verified=1, quiet failure swallowed in except).

Write-access protection (company_lock.py)

Sentinel display WiFi connected

Auto-adopt orphan positions in reconciliation

Code-health trio added to tools/ (vulture, ruff, radon wrappers)
Early-access TOS modal + non-restrictive setup overlay — built dormant behind EARLY_ACCESS_TOS_ENABLED=False
rotate_logs.py landed in git (was running from cron on pi5 but untracked)
JS init-killer fixed: Jinja substitution inside a // comment produced a literal '<' that aborted dashboard init for all users (commit bba337a)
Phase 3c.a/b: Gate 5 window proximity nudge + trader window consumer (v1 news-triggered entry path removed)
Phase 4.a/b/d: ATR column on trade_windows + ATR-scaled bands + trader reads ATR from window (single source of truth)
Phase 5.a: Gate 4 EVENT_RISK scheduled-event calendar (Nasdaq earnings + macro_events table)
Phase 5.b: cooling_off after stop-out (24h default; Gate 4 sub-gate)
Phase 5.c: daily_master.md end-of-day audit rollup
Audit Round 1 (2026-04-20): 5 critical bugs fixed — missing time/timezone imports, out-of-scope trade_events, candidate-gen tx_date dedup, Gate 4 ticker dedup (killed AAPL runaway)
Audit Round 4 (2026-04-20): macro window anchor pinned (INSERT OR IGNORE) + .known_good/ cleanup (832K snapshot deleted) + portal customer_count template-var fix
Audit Round 5 (2026-04-20): BIL concentration alert (Gate 0 sub-gate + daily notification) + tradable-asset cache (Alpaca /v2/assets filter in Candidate Generator)
Audit Rounds 6-8 (2026-04-20): 11 small/medium Phase-B follow-ups — tradable_assets in main migrations, three F821 catches on re-sweep, validator missing-timestamp = STALE
Phase B re-run audit (2026-04-20): 139 → 70 findings across 5 subsystems, 50% reduction after Rounds 6-8 landed

Audit Round 9 (2026-04-20): transaction safety — reduce_position + update_portfolio now atomic (single with self.conn() block; same pattern close_position got in R7.2); price_poller INSERT loop + DELETE-stale wrapped in explicit BEGIN/COMMIT; cooling_off(ticker, cool_until) composite index; tradable_cache pagination-truncation warn at 1000-multiple boundary; get_api_call_history() rewritten to WHERE timestamp >= ? (was date(timestamp) pattern, R6 fixed sibling); _send_sms / _send_email now check r.ok + log on non-2xx; ATR / volume_avg log reason when empty; gate4/5/5.5/6 guard signal.get('ticker') or '' + portfolio.get('cash', 0)

Phase C Patch 1 (2026-04-20): D4 datetime.utcnow() → datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None) across 26 sites in 10 files (Python 3.12 deprecation); D6 retail_shared.py created — kill_switch_active, get_active_customers, is_market_hours consolidated from 3-5 near-duplicate copies
Phase C Patch 2 (2026-04-20): D5 portal lint — 14 unused HTML id= attributes removed (zero CSS / JS / addEventListener references); snb-* and tab-* kept (dynamic showTab() string concat)

Phase C Patch 3 (2026-04-20): D2 portal complexity refactor — 12 private helpers extracted from 4 hotspot endpoints (_verify_stripe_signature + _handle_checkout_completed; _enrich_single_db_position + _extract_orphan_positions; _status_locked_mode + _compute_user_warnings; _parse_db_dt_to_et + _session_bin_index + _resolve_trading_session_date + _build_market_bins + _aggregate_customer_market_activity + _aggregate_user_sessions_historical). Line counts: stripe_webhook 196→84, _enrich_positions 112→14, get_system_status 182→99, api_admin_market_activity 366→165. Zero behavior changes.

Phase C Patch 4 (2026-04-20): D1 trader run() refactor — 897 lines → 15-line orchestrator via 11 named helpers. Data flow now explicit: db/alpaca/now/session_log created in _init_clients and passed to every downstream helper; positions refreshed at the top of each block; trade_events summed from three helpers. Zero behavior changes verified by dry-run against pi5 paper account.

Round 10 Patch A (2026-04-20): 4 mechanical fixes — sector_screener datetime.utcfromtimestamp → fromtimestamp(tz=utc) (Phase C D4 only caught utcnow); scheduler is_market_hours now delegates to retail_shared (D6 missed this site, boundary differed by 1s at 16:00); dead BIL rebalance guard removed (second `if buy >= threshold` was unreachable); news_agent fetch_with_retry now resets _fetch_circuit_open on successful fetch (was permanently sticky once tripped)

Round 10 Patch B (2026-04-20): open_position() and sweep_monthly_tax() now atomic (portfolio read + writes in one transaction); composite index idx_approvals_status_queued on pending_approvals(status, queued_at)

Round 10 Patch C (2026-04-20): _run_monthly_tax_sweep uses portfolio.get('realized_gains', 0); _status_locked_mode returns user_warnings=[] (missing field would crash JS); two sqlite3 connection leaks in portal wrapped in context managers

Round 10 Patch D (2026-04-20): retail_shared docstring explains why fetch_with_retry stays local; politician-weight bare-excepts downgraded to log.debug; SessionLock + _business_day_offset gain defensive docs (2 false-positive audit findings)
BIL_OVER_ALLOCATED health-check exempts sub-$500 accounts (was firing on $61 test account with $39 in BIL); kept catching real-account defensive-posture ($39,997/$59,995)
Auditor gains 'disabled' flag for nodes — pi2w_monitor skipped until hardware returns (was 58 NODE_UNREACHABLE hits/day)

pi4b synthos-company repo cleaned — untracked data/backup_status.json + fidget_latest.json (runtime drift); gitignore broadened for logs/* / *.bak / *.pre_*_bak / data/archives/; 3 stale *.pre_dbleak_bak files deleted (Apr 14); git status now empty

Enrichment pipeline reconstruction (2026-04-21): discovered market_daemon had been running ONE 54-second overnight cycle each morning then exiting, never entering the intraday loop. Root cause: systemd timer fired at 09:10 but main() dispatcher treated hour==9 AND minute<PREMARKET_START_MIN(15) as 'before pre-market → overnight cycle → exit'. Fix: timer 09:10→09:15 alignment. Symptom: window_calculator never ran intraday, no trade_windows populated, trader had nothing in-band to evaluate. User-caught via 'why aren't 53 VALIDATED signals trading?' question.

Overnight cycle completion (2026-04-21): run_overnight_cycle() was missing bias_detection, candidate_generator, window_calculator, tradable_refresh, run_screener, earnings_refresh — only ran the validation chain. Monday pre-market had to catch up all once-daily work from scratch. Now mirrors run_premarket_prep.

Standalone 24/7 price_poller (2026-04-21): moved from inline market_daemon loop call to its own synthos-price-poller.{service,timer} unit pair. Fires OnUnitActiveSec=60s regardless of market_daemon state, so live_prices stays fresh pre-pre-market / post-close / weekends.

run_premarket_selfcheck (2026-04-21): advisory readiness gate between pre-market prep and market_loop. Validates 7 categories (tradable_cache fresh, earnings_cache populated, VALIDATED signals exist, trade_windows computed today, live_prices non-empty, portal listening, disk space OK). On failure: log + PREMARKET_SELFCHECK_FAIL event + deduped notification + continue (advisory per user spec).

Mid-day market_daemon restart fires enrichment immediately (2026-04-21): last_enrichment / last_recon initialized to now-interval so the first loop iteration triggers the 30-min cycle instead of waiting 30 min. Matters for restart scenarios (crash recovery, manual restart, operator intervention).

_MARKET_STATE_UPDATED key-name fix (2026-04-21): validator_stack_agent.py:459 read _MARKET_STATE_UPDATED to check staleness but market_state_agent never wrote that key (only _MARKET_STATE + _MARKET_STATE_SCORE). Every validator run flagged DEGRADED_STALE_MARKET_STATE. One-line addition to persist_state() fixes it.

Candidate filter: combined_score → momentum_score (2026-04-21): sector-driven candidate emission was actually filtering on news+sentiment (combined_score = news*0.4 + sentiment*0.4 + weight*0.2, zero weight on sector momentum). Caught when 11 top sector leaders including TGT 0.94, CAT 0.90, DLR 0.90, AVGO 0.90 weren't being emitted despite strong momentum. Added momentum_score column to sector_screening (persisted by sector_screener's already-computed calc_momentum_score), switched candidate_generator to filter + rank by momentum_score with threshold 0.45. combined_score kept as informational for portal display. Emission at 0.45: ~30 candidates after MAX_PER_SECTOR=3 + MAX_TOTAL=30 caps, all 11 sectors represented, quality distribution (10 at 0.90+, 13 at 0.75-0.89, 6 at 0.60-0.74).

Sector screener cadence doubled 1×/day → 2×/day (2026-04-21): added run_screener() to run_close_session() so it fires at 16:00 ET in addition to pre-market 09:15. Gives tomorrow's pre-market fresher data (<17h old vs ~24h old) and feeds any overnight_cycle runs tonight. Momentum scoring inputs are slow-moving (3m return, 20d/50d SMAs, volume ratios) so 2×/day is the correct cadence — intraday refreshing produces ~identical scores. Graceful degradation: if close-run fails, pre-market's own 09:15 run brings everything back to current; fault_detection's 30h stale threshold tolerates a missed day.

News attribution patch (2026-04-21): measured 40.9% of last-14-day Benzinga signals had no ticker/name match in headline (~24/week reaching ACTED_ON with misattributed tickers — e.g. AAL on a Virgin Atlantic article, BAC on Anthropic news). Patch adds three changes at Alpaca ingestion: (A enforced) drop articles whose tagged symbols are all crypto-USD pairs or non-tradable; (C shadow) re-rank multi-symbol articles by headline match — ticker-in-headline +3, name-token +2, alias +2, pick best, flag when != symbols[0]; populates signals.company from tradable_assets.name (previously empty). New signal_attribution_flags table + 90d cleanup. Shadow digest to notifications at close_session. Review scheduled 2026-04-28 to decide on enforcing C + no-match rejection.

Late-day stop tightening disabled (2026-04-21, env var): LATE_DAY_TIGHTEN_PCT=0.0 set in pi5's live .env + .env.known_good after 8-day stop-loss analysis showed the mechanism (pull trail_stop 25% closer every 30s after 15:00 ET) was converting breakevens/slight-losers into noise-level stop exits rather than protecting real gains. 6 stops fired in the 15 ET window over 8 days averaging ±0.5% P&L with 50/50 gain/loss split vs 90% real-loss stops earlier in the day. Trailing stop still active (ATR_TRAIL_MULTIPLIER=2.0), SPY-correlation widening still active — only the automatic tightening after 15:00 ET is off. Re-evaluate in 2-4 weeks once exit_performance has ≥20 exits for optimizer verdict.

arch.json drift audit (2026-04-23): operational ground-truth pull across pi4b+pi5 surfaced arch.json v3.9 claims that no longer matched reality. Fixed: (1) company_scoop.py listed as 'daemon live' but actually not running — process absent, no systemd unit, cron comment says 'replaces cron-based company_scoop.py' (replacement daemon never started, scoop.log empty since 2026-04-18). Status changed to 'broken' with decision needed: revive-as-service or formally retire. (2) company_vault.py listed as 'cron 1h' but actual cron is daily 01:45 --backup-now. (3) 9 pi5 agents (trade_logic, news, sentiment, window_calculator, macro_regime, market_state, bias/fault/validator detection) previously labeled 'daemon' or 'daemon subprocess' — all are in fact subprocesses spawned per enrichment cycle by market_daemon (or trade_daemon for trade_logic), never standalone long-running processes. Relabeled to 'subprocess (called by market_daemon enrichment cycle, ~30min)'. Additional stale operational items flagged for separate cleanup commit: synthos-login.service unit file (disabled), /home/pi/synthos_build/ (empty skeleton), /home/pi/synthos-process/ (dead cancelled-node repo), synthos-portal.service.bak.20260418_081448 (stale backup in /etc/systemd/system/ on pi5).
